GenerateReportsAction - Class in controller
GenerateReportsAction prompts the user to choose a report type, date range, and output format, then generates the specified report using the ReportService.
GenerateReportsAction(ReportService) - Constructor for class controller.GenerateReportsAction
 
generateSingleSheet(File, LedgerReportContext) - Static method in class controller.ReportGenerator
 
GenerateTrialBalanceAction - Class in controller
GenerateTrialBalanceAction prompts the user to enter a date range and output format, then generates a trial balance report using the configured ReportService.
GenerateTrialBalanceAction(ReportService) - Constructor for class controller.GenerateTrialBalanceAction
Constructs the action using an existing ReportService.
GenerateTrialBalanceAction(TrialBalanceService, Ledger) - Constructor for class controller.GenerateTrialBalanceAction
Constructs the action by internally building a ReportService using the provided TrialBalanceService and Ledger.

getCreditSums() - Method in class core.TrialBalanceResult
Returns an unmodifiable map of credit sums (positive values) keyed by account type name.
getCreditSums() - Method in interface nonprofitbookkeeping.interfaces.TrialBalanceResultIntf
Returns a map of total credit amounts (as positive numbers) keyed by account type name.
getCreditSums() - Method in class nonprofitbookkeeping.service.impl.InMemoryTrialBalanceService
Returns the credit sums from the most recent trial balance result.
getCreditSums() - Method in class nonprofitbookkeeping.service.TrialBalanceResultIntf
Returns an unmodifiable copy of the credit sums.
getCreditSums() - Method in interface nonprofitbookkeeping.service.TrialBalanceService
Returns a map where the keys are account identifiers (as Strings) and the values are the total credit amounts for those accounts.

GrantsPanel - Class in nonprofitbookkeeping.panels
GrantsPanel displays a list of grants along with their detailed information.

Donor-like model class representing a Grant.
